{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Sector Twenty-three
| introduced = Reaper
}}

== Reaper ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|[[Suriel]]’s homeworld is in [[Sector Twenty-three]].<ref name="cradle-10-reaper-c22">''Reaper'', chapter 22</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Reaper]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
